creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=409727
The latest update of mail/postfix (from 2.11 to 3.1) breaks existing installations because there are incompatible changes. For example missing VDA support.
This should be noted in /usr/ports/UPDATING as was everytime before.
